scripts.cap:copy: npm run build:www && npx cap copy ios
scripts.assets:build: qlmanage -t -s 1024 -o assets assets/icon.svg && qlmanage -t -s 2732 -o assets assets/splash.svg && mv -f assets/icon.svg.png assets/icon.png && mv -f assets/splash.svg.png assets/splash.png && cp -f assets/splash.png assets/splash-dark.png
scripts.cap:ios: npm run build:www && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap sync ios
scripts.ota: npm run build:www && npx @capgo/cli bundle upload --channel production
